info: You take 50% more damage when being guard broken. On Flourish, Critical, or Uppercut, apply the Authoritative status effect to yourself, increasing all posture damage you deal by 50% for 30 seconds.
name: Curse of the Authoritative
in_game_desc: On critical, uppercut, or flourish, apply Authoritative on your opponent making them take 50% more posture damage. When you get guardbroken, take 50% more damage.
